evidence.text: Agent Service, Commerzbank AG built Ava—an AI-powered agent that automates customer interactions through highly secure agentic orchestration, persistent memory, and full compliance. Ava manages 30,000-plus customer conversations every month, resolving 75% of requests autonomously and delivering round-the-clock support. Commerzbank AG sets a new benchmark for reliable, compliant banking, fully aligned with global AI regulations.
